subject: A Review of Set Theory
question: Subway prepared 60 4-inch sandwiches for a birthday party. Among these sandwiches, 45 of them had tomatoes, 30 had both tomatoes and onions, and 5 had neither tomatoes nor onions. Using a Venn diagram, how many sandwiches did he make with (a) tomatoes or onions? (b) onions? (c) onions but not tomatoes?
answer: (a) 55 sandwiches with tomatoes or onions. (b) There are 40 sandwiches with onions. (c) There are 10 sandwiches with onions but not tomatoes
explanation: Answer: (a) 55 sandwiches with tomatoes or onions. (b) There are 40 sandwiches with onions. (c) There are 10 sandwiches with onions but not tomatoes
